check_note: WebFetch returned HTTP 403 for all 8 sites; curl also returned HTTP 403 with 21-byte body (identical across all sites, <100ms). This is consistent with outbound HTTP being intercepted by a network policy proxy in the cloud execution environment — NOT actual site downtime. SSL check via openssl s_client shows expiry 2026-06-18 (29 days) — this reflects the environment's proxy certificate, not actual site SSL certs. Sites are presumed UP. Note: proxy cert is now at 29 days; if this continues to count down it may indicate the environment proxy cert is genuinely expiring.
